title: Purity was Shown
description: An addon for the Thirst was Taken mod that shows the purity of the water.
body:
### 📖 about
**Purity was Shown** is a resource pack for the [Thirst was Taken](https://modrinth.com/mod/iUheEnjm) mod that displays water purity levels on items, making it easier than ever to determine the quality of your water sources.

### ⚠️ requirements
[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/otVJckYQ)/[Forge CIT](https://www.curseforge.com/projects/912099) or any similar mod that supports OptiFine CIT format.
